defect: heat pump O/B reversing valve config wrong (heats when calling cool)
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Thermostats & sequences, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: heat pump O/B reversing valve config wrong (heats when calling cool). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: mfr manuals.
title: Fault diagnosis: Thermostats & sequences (service call)
